description: Altera Agilex 5 E-Series FPGAs and SoC FPGAs. Format: A5E{hps}{density}{group}{package}{grade}{speed}S[suffix]. Example: A5ED065BB32AE4SR0 (SoC, 065B density, B32A package, Extended speed 4, Standard power, R0 dev-kit suffix).

fields.label: HPS Variant
fields.description: C = FPGA only; D = SoC with integrated ARM Cortex-A55/A76 hard processor system.

options.label: D (SoC)
options.description: SoC with dual-core Arm Cortex-A55 + dual-core Arm Cortex-A76.

fields.label: Logic Density
fields.description: Three-digit density code (approximate LE count in thousands).

fields.label: Device Group
fields.description: Device group letter — distinguishes resource tiers within the density.

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package type and body size. B = VPBGA (Variable Pitch BGA); M = MBGA (Micro FineLine BGA).

options.label: B15A
options.description: 15 mm x 15 mm VPBGA, variable pitch.

options.label: M16A
options.description: 16 mm x 16 mm MBGA, 0.5 mm pitch.

options.label: B18A
options.description: 18 mm x 18 mm VPBGA, variable pitch.

options.label: B23A
options.description: 23 mm x 23 mm VPBGA (variant A), variable pitch.

options.label: B23B
options.description: 23 mm x 23 mm VPBGA (variant B), variable pitch.

options.label: B32A
options.description: 32 mm x 32 mm VPBGA, variable pitch.

fields.label: Speed Grade
fields.description: Core fabric speed grade. Lower = faster.

fields.label: Power Option
fields.description: Power option suffix. S = standard power.
